pi_items.source: setup_rocket_chat.sh script invoking seed_rocket_chat.py with --channel-name release-updates.
Parsed from rocketchat_releases_github_api_2026-02-16.json dataset using seed_rocket_chat.py sorting logic (latest stable).

privileged_info_summary: By analyzing the GitHub API releases snapshot (rocketchat_releases_github_api_2026-02-16.json) and the environment setup scripts, it is verified that the target channel is 'release-updates'. The latest stable release injected into the channel has the tag '8.1.0', published on '2026-02-10', with the tracking URL 'https://github.com/RocketChat/Rocket.Chat/releases/tag/8.1.0'. The data is non-synthetic and derived from an authentic snapshot of the official Rocket.Chat GitHub repository.
